about our brand

At Gematria, we create science-driven supplements with love and care, inspired by the pioneering vision of Dr. Todd Ovokaitys. A Johns Hopkins-trained expert in cellular health, Dr. Ovokaitys brings decades of groundbreaking research to every product.

Our mission is to empower your body and mind with supplements that blend cutting-edge science and genuine care for your longevity and well-being.

Learn more
